title: WNUT-2017 - Emerging and Rare Entity Recognition
description: Named entity recognition for emerging and rare entities in noisy user-generated text, based on the W-NUT 2017 shared task (Derczynski et al., W-NUT@EMNLP 2017). Covers novel entity types in social media text from Twitter and Reddit.
citation:
@inproceedings{derczynski-etal-2017-results,

    author = "Derczynski, Leon  and Nichols, Eric  and van Erp, Marieke  and Limsopatham, Nut",
    booktitle = "Proceedings of the 3rd Workshop on Noisy User-generated Text",
    month = sep,
    year = "2017",
    address = "Copenhagen, Denmark",
    publisher = "Association for Computational Linguistics",
    url = "https://aclanthology.org/W17-4418",
    pages = "140--147"
}
